name: Affinity Designer
description: Professional vector graphic design and illustration application

extraction.notes: Serif uses Sparkle with custom feeds on s3.amazonaws.com. Same pattern as Affinity Photo, different product path segment (/designer/).

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase). Same Serif/Affinity V2 product line as Photo and Publisher. All three share the same appcast URL pattern on s3.amazonaws.com. Mac App Store version uses /mac/mas/<product>/ path. Also available on Mac App Store.
